titleStmt.title: SII 24.561: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 561. (A.R. No. 102 of 1936-37.) WEST AND SOUTH WALLS OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE IN THE DAŚĀVA-TĀRA TEMPLE

summary.p: Records the conferment of the title of Jīya at the Tirumaṅgai-Āḻvār sannidhi on Rāmayyaṅgār under the name Nārāyaṇa-Jīyar, specifying his duties in the general administration and the periodical renovations of the temple. Gives the line of the local pontiffs beginning with Aḻagiyamaṇavāḷa-Jīyar who was initiated by Ādivarāha Śaṭhagōpasvāmin. The date given viz., Śaka 1619 Īśvara, Puraṭṭāśi, śu. 11 is probably equivalent to A.D. 1697, September, 16. (See No. 586 below).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . śrīraṅgam tecāvatāram tirumaṅkai Āḻvār caṉṉati śrīkāriyattukku kkaṟtarkaḷāy samstānattile Eḻuntaruḷi Irunta jiyyāḷ tirumuṭi kiṟamam . perumāḷ koyil ṉittiyavāsam ceykiṟa māṭapūci śrībhāṣyam Upayakavi kovintāriyarukku Ātivarāka caṭakopasvāmi
samāśrayaṇamum Āśramasvīkāramum cāticcu śrīpuruṣottamuṭaiyāṉ tiruvātāṉamum cātittu Aḻakiya maṇavāḷajiyyariṉṟu dāsanyanāmamum prasātittu tecāvatāram tirumaṅkai Āḻvār caṉṉati kaiṅkariyamum śrīsudarśana pāñcajanyamum Aāsanamum śrībhāṣyamum bhagavadviṣayamum prasātittu
Āḻvār caṉṉati kaiṅkariyattil Eḻuntaruḷi Irunta Aḻakiya maṇavāḷasvāmiyai ttuṭaṅki Avaruṭaiya tiruvaṭikaḷ sammandham tirumeṉi sammandham samāśrayaṇam Āśramasvīkāra mutalāy samsthānattile Eḻuntaṟuḷi Irunta jiyyāḷ Aḻakiya maṇavāḷasvāmi Emperumāṉār cuvāmi
periya śrīnivāsasvāmi virakati śrīmannārāyaṇasvāmi periya kalyāṇarāmānuja svāmi parakālasvāmi vevāḷa rāmānujasvāmi Avar niyamaṉappaṭikku śrīraṅgakalyāṇa virarākavasvāmi Eḻuntaṟuḷi Irukkayil periya kalyāṇa rāmānujasvāmi pūrvvāśramam marumāṉ koyil ce
1. An attempt to deliberately erase this term seems to have been made.

vakar śrīrāmayaṅkārukku . svastiśrī śakābdam 1000 6 100 10 9 Itaṉmel cellāniṉṟa Icurasamvatsaram puraṭṭāci mātam śuklapakṣattu Ekāteci ṉāḷ tirumaṅkai Āḻvār ciṣyamukaṭapraṣoccāraṇam sātikka trayoteci ṉāḷ śrīraṅgakalyāṇarāmā nujasvāmikku mātatiram cāttukaiyil
śrīmannārāyaṇajiyariṉṟu dāsyanāmamum prasātittu Āḻvār caṉṉati kaiṅkariyamum nemiccapiṉ Āḻvār koṇṭaṟuḷiṉaṉ kaiṅkariyaṅkaḷum tirukkopura vācal tirunilai kāl melppaṭṭi Akavaṇai mukavaṇai Uttaram melpaṟappumāka ciṟuṇoddhāraṇattukkuc ceṉṟatu poṉ 5 10 caṉ
ṉativācal ciyyāḷ Eḻuntaṟuḷi Irukkiṟa veḷimaṭattil(t) tiruppaṇi reṭṭaip paṟṟi Aṅkaṇam Eṭṭukkuṟaṭuḷpaṭac cilavu poṉ 4 100 jiyyāḷ śrīvaiṣṇavāḷ Amutu ceytaruḷa parakālapālart tirumaṇṭapam reṭṭai paṟṟi Aṅkaṇam Āṟukkuc cilavu poṉ 2 100 tecāvatāram Atbhutadivya
vimānam Arddhamaṇṭapam makāmaṇṭapam ciṟuṇottāraṇac cilavu poṉ 2 100 Āḻvār tivviya vimāṉam kalivicayam ciṟuṇottaāraṇa cilavu poṉ 3 10 vetāntācāriyar caṉṉati ciṟuṇottāraṇattukkum tiruppaṇic cilavu poṉ 100 5 10 tiruccuṟṟu
ppaṟṟiyatu Eṭuttukkaṭṭip pukai pokki Iraṇṭu cuṟṟuttirumatiḷ metttiraṇai paḻaya tirumaṭappaḷḷi Uḷpaṭa kārai Oṭṭa cilavu poṉ 7 10 Āḻvār tiruvuñcal tiru maṇṭapam kumutavalli maṇavāḷavilācam kaltiruppaṇiṉūta Iraṭṭaippaṟṟi Aṅ kaṇam pattukku kuṟaṭuḷpaṭa Aṭaṅkal poṉ 4 100 periya caṉṉati tirumañcaṉam periya kal toṭṭa tirumaṭappaḷḷiyil Amutu Uḷpaṭac cilavu poṉ 100 Āḻvār caṉṉatikkumel ṟṟaikku cuṟṟuk kalcuvar maṭakkoṭuṅkai Uttiram pākkalluḷpaṭac cilavu poṉ 100 3 10 māṭmāḷikai cūḻ tiruvitiyil
Āḻvār Eḻuntaṟuḷipaṭiy kalmaṭam Aṅkaṇam patiṉāṟukku ciṟuṇottāraṇattukkum ṉūtaṉamāka kaṭṭivicca Aṅkaṇam mūṉukkum cilavu poṉ 4 100 Āka tiruppaṇic cilavu poṉ 1000 6 100 3 10 tecāvatārap perumāḷ tiraṭṭa tiruvuḷi tiruccaṅku Apaya[ha*]stam toḷvaḷai kaivaḷai Āram śrīcaṭakopam matsyāvatāram kūṟmāvatāram Iraṇṭu tiruṉāmaṅkaḷ tirumeṉimuḻutukku taṅkamulāttukku tāmpiṟavilai Uḷpaṭa poṉ 8 100 tirumaṅkai Āḻvār tiruvapiṣekam tirumakarakkuḻai Añcalihastam rtti Āram rāmānucaṉ veluḷpaṭa taṅkamulāttukku tāmpiṟa vilai Uḷpaṭa poṉ 100 3 10 Āka taṅkak kiṟayam tāmpiṟa vilai Uḷpaṭa
pon_ 9 100 3 10 caṉṉati Upakaraṇam pañcapāttiram rāmānujan pañcapāttiraveti reṇṭu veṅkalam tirumaṇkuttuviḷakku ceppukkuṭam tirumañcaṉattāḻi Uḷpaṭa caṉṉati muṇukkum koḷ mutal poṉ 2 100 Āka caṉṉati Upakaraṇakkiṟayam Uḷpaṭa poṉ 10 730 Āḷmākāṇac cilavu poṉ 100 5 10 Ākattiruppaṇi Āḷ mākāṇac cilavu Uḷpaṭa poṉ 3 100 2 10 10 Ippaṭi tirumaṅkai Āḻvār śrīmannanārāyaṇajiyyaraik koṇṭu Aṉaittaḻaku kaiṅkariyaṅkaḷum koṇṭaruḷiṉapaṭikku Aṉaivarum cevikkum paṭipoṉ Eṟi yaruḷappaṇṇiṉapaṭi śrīparakāla śrī §
Digital edition of SII 24.561 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
